feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to deploy SAPUI5 apps on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

I am currently involving on a SAP S/4HANA Public Edition implementation and we have some requirements that requires custom development. These developments must built using SAPUI5. I would like confirming if it is possible to implement these developments on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public. I have looked at documentation for that, but I have not found definitively answer.

Best regard,

Anthony

SAPUI5 SAP Fiori SAP ERP SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP Business Application Studio SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Hello and help?
entry.content:
Hi All, 
I'm brand new here, just signed up today.
I am wanting to join the HCM board, so I can post the below question - but there doesn't seem to be a button to join? Any clues?

QUESTION:

Can someone please clarify the best way to set up an initial and refresher training in SAP SuccessFactors? Currently the substitutions feature is being used to kick off a 3-year countdown, however this set up method is creating a lot of surplus completion data, that is confusing for users, but also not useful for reporting.

Context: 
1. Learning Item One - completed by the user first
2. Learning Item Two - completed by the user three years after they complete Learning Item One. Learning Item Two is then completed by the user every three years.
3. Learning Item Two (the refresher training) appears in the users 'My Learning Assignments' list 30 days before the three-year period is up.
4. User completes the refresher training, and the three-year countdown starts again.

We are currently here:
Curricula one with Assignment Profile assigns Learning Item One to users.
Curricula two with Assignment Profile assigns Learning Item Two to users, based on their completion of Learning Item One. Retraining set to 1,095 days.
Problem we have: Learning Item Two is appearing in users 'My Learning Assignments' list as soon as they have completed Learning Item One. This is not what we want, we want Learning Item Two to appear in three years' time. We know it's because of the way we have set up the items, but we don't know the best way to set it up to deliver the outcome we want.

Any tips / tricks or documentation on best practice initial and refresher training set up would be much appreciated.

entry.title: SAP BTP IS (CI) vs SAP PO Comparison
entry.content: Hello, does anyone know if there is any SAP published document out there that shows a comparison between SAP BTP IS (CI) and SAP PO? I need one for a client.

entry.title: VENDOR BALANCE DIFFRENCES ISSUE
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
There is a difference in the Ledger Balance and Aging report in case of Foreign currency.
We have found the difference is because of the exchange rate. 
 
For example:
 
Invoice Booked at exchange rate 90 per $.
After 2 month, the exchange rate is 92 per $. Hence the amount is calculated based on the current exchange rate.
 
This is providing the wrong aging report. 
 
Regards,
Shubham Bulley
SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA SAP Business One SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Fiori (APP Server)のvCPU数増強について
entry.content:
皆様

閲覧いただきありがとうございます。

【背景】
Rise With SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private EditionにてSAP Fiori (APP Server)のTシャツモデルを
以下に増強したいです。（現在はLサイズになります。）
・メモリ：64GB⇒128GB
・vCPU数：16⇒32

【質問】
以下の製品を契約した場合、メモリは64GB追加されますが、
vCPU数については、16⇒32に増強されるのでしょうか。

[PROD]
8018042
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Application Server for Linux, additional production tenant, upgrade

[QAS : Non PROD]
8018051
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Application Server for Linux, additional nonproduction tenant, upgrade

もしご存じの方がいらっしゃればご意見や情報の共有を頂けると大変ありがたいです。
お手数おかけいたしますが何卒宜しくお願い致します。

【補足】
なお、上記製品でvCPU数が増強されない場合は、以下の契約に置き換えることで
L⇒XLにサイズアップされることになると考えています。
■現在
8008864
SAP Fiori Hub on ASE Cloud, private edition (L)

■変更後
8008865
SAP Fiori Hub on ASE Cloud, private edition (XL)

以上、よろしくお願いいたします。

Kazumi

entry.title: DOCUMENT NUMBER GENERATION USING BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST.
entry.content:
INTRODUCTION

BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST is a standard SAP interface that allows you to post financial documents directly from an external system (like a non-SAP system) into SAP. This BAPI (Business Application Programming Interface) is primarily used for integrating external systems with SAP's Financial Accounting (FI) module.

Here are some common purposes for using BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST:

  1. Integration: It enables seamless integration between SAP and non-SAP systems for financial document posting. This is particularly useful when companies have legacy systems or third-party applications that need to interact with SAP FI.

  2. Automation: The BAPI allows for automating the posting of financial documents, reducing manual effort and potential errors. This is useful for high-volume transaction environments where manual entry is impractical.

  3. Data Consistency: By using BAPIs, companies can ensure data consistency between SAP and other systems. This helps in maintaining accurate financial records across the organization.

  4. Real-time Processing: BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST facilitates real-time posting of financial documents, ensuring that transactions are reflected immediately in the SAP system. This supports timely decision-making and reporting.

  5. Custom Applications: Developers can leverage this BAPI to build custom applications that interact with SAP FI, tailored to specific business needs.

  6. Batch Processing: While it supports real-time processing, the BAPI can also be used for batch processing of financial documents, allowing for efficient handling of large volumes of data.

IMPLEMENTATION

STEP 1 :-  Go to tcode - se37 (Function Builder)

 

  • In se37 we will display our Bapi  BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST.

 

 

  •  Execute The Source Code.

 

  • A new window will appear where now we have to enter data to generate the document number. 

 

 

 

STEP 2) :-  ENTER THE MANDATORY FIELDS REQUIRED TO POST THE DOCUMENT NUMBER IN BKPF TABLE.

IMPORTING PARAMETERS

Header Data

All mandatory fields are required in the Document header.

FIELD NAME

User Name

USNAM

Company Code

COMP_CODE

Document Date

DOC_DATE

Posting Date

PSTING_DATE

Document Type

DOC_TYPE

 

TEST DATA:

USNAM

COMP_CODE

DOC_DATE

PSTING_DATE

DOC_TYPE

BASANTJ

1710

13.03.2024

13.03.2024

RV

 

 

 

TABLES:

 

1)      ACCOUNTGL 

Description

Parameter for transferring G/L account line items

The following field must be filled out:

  • GL_ACCOUNT    G/L account

The currency fields are not contained in this parameter. They must be transferred separately in the parameter CurrencyAmount for the various currency types and currencies. The system creates a link to the relevant line item via the line item number ITEMNO_ACC, which for this reason must be unique for each line item.

FIELD NAME

Item account number

ITEMNO_ACC

GL account

GL_ACCOUNT

Item text

ITEM_TEXT

Company code

COMP_CODE

Posting date

PSTNG_DATE

 

TEST DATA

ITEMNO_ACC

GL_ACCOUNT

ITEM_TEXT

COMP_CODE

PSTNG_DATE

0000000001

10010001

LINE ITEM 1

1710

13.03.2024

 

2)      Account receivable

Description

Parameter for transferring customer line items

If the CUSTOMER number is not given, only the general ledger is updated. In this case, an entry must be made in the field GL_ACCOUNT (G/L account for general ledger accounting).

The currency fields are not contained in this parameter. They must be transferred separately in the parameter CurrencyAmount for the various currency types and currencies. The system creates a link to the relevant line item via the line item number ITEMNO_ACC, which for this reason must be unique for each line item.

 

FIELD NAME

Item account number

ITEMNO_ACC

Customer number

CUSTOMER

Reference key

REF_KEY_1

Company code

COMP_CODE

Item text

ITEM_TEXT

 

TEST DATA

ITEMNO_ACC

CUSTOMER

REF_KEY_1

COMP_CODE

ITEM_TEXT

0000000002

17100001

XYZ_TEST_2

1710

CUSTOMER ENTRY

 

3)      Currency Amount

 

Description

This parameter describes the currency fields for a particular line item.
The parameter is a required field for the method POST. If the parameter is not maintained for the method CHECK, only a general account assignment check is carried out. Individual line items or several documents can be checked at once in this way.

The following fields must be filled out:

  • CURRENCY     Currency key
  • AMT_DOCCUR    Currency amount

Value range

The field CURR_TYPE  (currency type) describes the role played by a currency in the SAP System.
The currency type can take on the following values, for example:

  • 00      Transaction currency
  • 10      Company code currency
  • 20      Controlling area currency
  • 30      Group currency
  • 40      Hard currency
  • 50      Index-based currency
  • 60      Global company currency

If an entry is not made in the field CURR_TYPE , the default value "00" is retained.

If only one data record is transferred in transaction currency for each line item, the field CURR_TYPE does not need to be filled out. If several data records are transferred for each line item, the currency type must be entered for each record.

FIELD NAME

Items account number

ITEMNO_ACC

Currency

CURRENCY

Amount

AMT_DOCCUR

 

TEST DATA

ITEMNO_ACC

CURRENCY

AMT_DOCCUR

0000000001

USD

2.000,0000-

0000000002

USD

  2.000,0000

 

 

Exporting Parameters.

The information from this document must be transferred when the FI/CO interface is called up. The source information is updated in all accounting documents, and is made up of the following fields.

  • AWTYP (OBJ_TYPE) Reference transaction
    Sender ID
  • AWKEY (OBJ_KEY) Reference key
    Source document number

The reference key is made up of:

    • AWREF Reference document number (10 digits)
      Source document number
    • AWORG Reference organizational unit (10 digits)
      Number range ID (if required)
  • AWSYS (OBJ_SYS) Logical system
    Logical system of source document

 

 

Posting Document Number.

  1. First go to se37 and click on function module.

 

 

 

  • Upload Your test data directory and execute it press back and again execute it to final commit the changes in BKPF table ( For which we used BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT ).

 

  • Now go to BKPF Table To find the entry.
  • Further Odata can be created using BKPF and BSEG tables.

The Data will be stored in BKPF and BSEG  table.

entry.title: Unable to maintain entries for custom table in SAP using SM30, after adding a new field to the table
entry.content:
Hello,

There is already a custom table in my development system. And I have add a new field to that table and activated it.
So, I wanted to update already existing entries of this table using SM30. But I am not able to see the new field added on the maintenance screen.


Eg: already have a customtable 'z_xyz' with one field say, 'abc'. values for the field 'abc' is maintained using SM30.
Now, I have added a new field 'def' and activated table in SE11.
Now, I have tried to maintain the table z_xyz using SM30, but not able to see the new field added to the maintenance screen (I could see only the field 'abc' not both 'abc' and 'def')

could anyone help me on this case, so that I can update existing record with the values for the new field created in that table?

entry.title: How to Post a Json Body to an Odata Url in CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

Please suggest how I post a JSON body to an odata url with a header and line item using CPI.

entry.title: Inquiry About Free Trials for SAP ERP Integration with Boomi
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently exploring integration options for SAP ERP with Boomi and was wondering if there are any free trials available for SAP ERP that can be used to connect with Boomi. I would appreciate any information or guidance you can provide on this matter.

Thank you.

entry.title: Determination of Factory Calendar for Supplier Invoice flexible Workflow Deadline
entry.content:
Hi,

We have implemented BADI - MRM_WF_FACTORY_CALENDAR to determine the factory calendar for Supplier Invoice flexible Workflow Deadline.

But this BADI implementation is not getting called when workflow triggers.

Anyone faced similar issue?  or any alternative solution to this issue.

Thanks,

Tusha

entry.title: CBO UI App - Custom Catalog Extensions - Add to Business Catalog
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP Public Cloud we have several CBO with UI applications.According to document documentation Custom Catalog Extensions are generated, and after we need to assign it to a Business Catalog.(only standard one - in the popup to select business catalogs).

How can we add to Customer Business Catalog(YY*)? I need to create separare business roles to restrict access to CBO UI Apps and with standard ones it's not possible.

entry.title: KSII doesn't recalculate the right activity rates
entry.content:
Hi,
I've taken the following steps：

executed transaction KSS2 （It is to be ok.）

executed transaction KSII （It goes smooth. No error was indicated）

However，after executing CON2, in cost center report S_ALR_87013611, debit and credit side didn't become equal.

One of cost center's credit side is not equal to the debit side.

I've checked the OKEW. It is listed in the splitting structures, which is same as other cost centers.

That means the actual cost splitting is OK.

Then I found the activity rates seems to be incorrect.

The rates for each activities are close to, but not equal to, the correct activity rates.

Is there any mistakes i made lead to the wrong calculation of the activity rates？ 

I have no idea about how to solve the problem.

Could anyone help？

entry.title: The CPI URL is not showing any data
entry.content:
Hi,

I have consumed the Odata url in CPI iFlow. After successfully generating the CPI URL, I tested it via Postman with a particular date range. It gave a status code of 200, but I didn't get any response. This odata url has more than 80k records for a particular date range. If I test this odata url in the gateway client, it shows a status code of 200. Please help me.

entry.title: How to seach in SAP Community?
entry.content:
Hi, 

After having created dozens of websites, and a couple of communities with thousands of users, I find myself unable to use SAP Community fluently.

I want to find information on how to use a particular functionality of an SAP product.
There is no "channel", "site", "group" or anything similar to the product, it is in a global "Technology Q&A" group with many, many other products.
To make up for this lack, we are supposed to have the TAGs, ok that's what there is.

But how do I search for something filtering also by tag?

 

I don't have time to read 300,000 posts 😄

if I add the name of the product to the search, it returns first those that contain the word in the title ... so it does not serve to filter correctly.

At least I have reduced the result to 1000 ... but still too many to read.

any ideas? it can't be that hard, I must be missing something.

Regards,

entry.title: SAP Community Datasphere
entry.content:
I have been contributing to the Datashpere community for a few years now. As one of the users of the first version od DSP, having participated in betas such as Data Flows, I have tried to help all those who had doubts about the product, and of course, I have also asked for advice when I was the one who did not have something clear.

I believe that the community is something very powerful, but this new version makes me lose a lot of time, time that I lend voluntarily.

In the previous version I logged in every day, it was part of my routine at work, which made me appear for many months as top 1 datasphere contributors in the old community.

But now, the obstacles that have been put to write a simple post, to comment answers in a thread or to do a simple search complicate its use.

Write a post

I enter the community by filtering by the tag "SAP Datasphere" ... something already rare (there is no group, folder or channel, only a tag), and I want to write a post and it makes me choose the "location".

WTF ... a lot of SAP Successfactors boards??. Mental note: leave DSP and learn SSFF, they even have groups!!!
Ok, remember where is the group where you write about datasphere ... yes, look in others, google it, ... ok, under "Products and Technology" > "Technology" > "Technology Q&A".  Mental note: for next time forget about datasphere, remember you are a technologist with questions and answers, so ... it's easy. 

Discuss

When someone asks a question and you answer it, many times there is a discussion about it, and you have to write several messages with the "Comment" option ... which allows you to enter a line of text, where you will write your answer comfortably, right? 

Have you tried mentioning someone in a comment? or using bold? or quote?... you can't.
Use notepad or open another window and type in a new post then copy and paste into the tiny reply box.

All this makes the job much easier, doesn't it?

Search for knowledge

Ok, I have a question and I want to see if anyone has asked about this topic. It is about how to UPDATE a table using a flow. Well you can't, but I'm looking for people who are interested in this topic, to ask them to vote for my "cutomer influence idea" to support it (please vote here) 

Go to seach box, select Q&A and write "update flow"

to much generic, not for datasphere ... it seems that the search does not take into account that I was using the datasphere tag on the page, ... add datasphere

did you mean atmosphere? ... SAP please add technical terms to index.

Ok, 1000 results, to much for me, How can I filter from the results the ones posted with the datasphere tag (which are the ones I am interested in)? I, at least, have not known how to do it.

 

 

These are just a few examples of things that at least in my case I used to do every day, now they become more complicated and difficult, and requiere more time (more of my time), for something that we do voluntary.

I just hope that someone from SAP DSP sees this and talks it over with those who manage the community, because in my opinion the increase in DSP adoption by customers and partners, is not reflected in the usage of the DSP community.

At least in my case, it doesn't motivate me to log in as often as it used to.

Regards,

entry.title: IS SAP GUI a relational database?
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am a job seeker and trying to add data entry into SAP on my resume, but I cannot seem to find a straight answer on whether or not SAP GUI is a relational database system or not. 
Any help in clarifying would be greatly appreciated and if I need to add anything to help provide enough context I will gladly do so. 

Thank you for your time

entry.title: How do I eliminate a page header from appearing on every page?
entry.content: I have created a sub report to an existing page.  However, the page header from first page keeps showing up on every page of the sub report.  How do I eliminate page header from repeating on every subsequent page?

entry.title: SAP Build apps, HTML 5 issue
entry.content:
Hi, 

I was able to deploy my SAP Build App apps to the BTP as HTML5 apps.

However, while clicking the link of these apps, i only have one message in the page ' Internal Server Error' .

Everything was working several days ago, and i did not change anything 

Thanks in advance !

entry.title: SAP: How to find the SAP Customizing path for specific tables
entry.content:
Sometimes, you might know the name of an SAP table and want to find where it's placed in the customizing path. This helps to figure out which SAP process it's part of or to do more customization related to that table.

Here's how to do it:

1) Let's say you know the table "T074" (Define Alternative Reconciliation Account for Down Payments) and you want to find where to customize it. To do this, go to transaction SM30 and click on the "Customizing" button.

2)  Press the corresponding button:

3) You'll see a window with a list of customization options that might be connected to the table you're searching for (like T074 in our case). Pick the one that best matches your needs based on the description and then press the "Enter" button.

4) You'll reach the customization menu directly at the option you selected, matching the table and choice you were seeking.

 

Simple, isn't it? This is incredibly helpful and can save you a lot of time!

I hope this helps you save time with your daily tasks!
SAP S/4HANA Finance

entry.title: Can we develop an Ashynchronus API in the S/4 Hana On-Premises System?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement that we need to develop an Ashynchronus API in the S/4 Hana On-Premise system. Is it possible or not?
